summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FitCluster AI hybrid intelligent fitness recommendation system. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend functionality excellent with beautiful dark theme and neon lime UI. Multi-step form flow, dashboard, ML insights, and video modals all working correctly. Only minor issue with food modal overlay in some cases.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepting clicks on food items in some cases
ui_bugs.workaround: ESC key or clicking outside modal works to close

passed_tests: Input validation with invalid data (422 errors)
Workout plan structure (7 days with exercises)
Diet plan structure (7 days with Indian meals)
ML insights structure (clustering, confidence, feature importance)
Stats row display (BMI, Calories, Protein, Cluster)
Exercise video modal with YouTube embed
ML insights panel with radar chart
Explainability panel with rule-based and ML decisions
Dark theme with neon lime accents
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor food modal overlay issue that occasionally prevents clicking on food items. Otherwise system is working excellently.
